oracle_analysis.adversary_characteristics: Handles switching loss well, hard to beat in switching-sensitive scenarios

implications_for_v18.storage_binding_regimes: capacity_aware baselines likely oracle - v1.8 storage dual must show clear advantage
implications_for_v18.switching_sensitive_regimes: switching_loss_max_pressure is strongest adversary - v1.8 needs stateful switching dual
implications_for_v18.completion_critical_regimes: max_pressure often sufficient - v1.8 should be conservative here
implications_for_v18.slack_regimes: max_pressure near-optimal - v1.8 should revert to MP behavior

recommended_v18_baselines: Keep all 6 current baselines, do not weaken
